description: Grupo Clarín S.A., together with its subsidiaries, operates in the media industry in Argentina an Internationally. It operates through Digital and Printed Publications; and Production and Distribution of Content segments. The Digital and Printed Publications segment includes newspapers with national and regional circulation, sports newspapers, the edition, and publication and distribution of magazines, as well as commercial printing; publishes newspapers, a sports daily; magazine publishing and editing and distribution. This segment also offers Diario Clarín, a national newspaper for the Spanish-speaking world; Olé, a sports newspaper for the Argentine market; and Genios, a children's magazine. The Production and Distribution of Content segment offers Canal 13 channels, amplitude modulation/frequency modulation radio broadcast stations, and Radio Mitre and La 100, as well as produces content for television, films and radio, and cable television signals; and organizes and broadcasts sporting events. The company was founded in 1945 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Grupo Clarín S.A. is a subsidiary of GC Dominio S.A.
